outcome.root_cause: Deploy 32a55d5 ("reports: switch to full report scan for accuracy"), the currently live commit on checkout-api, replaced the fast indexed report query with a simulated full-table-scan that awaits a 2200–3800ms sleep before responding on GET /api/reports. This directly caused the p95/p99 latency breach.

deploys.message_first_line: config: source PRICING_TABLE from env only
deploys.author: Victim Dev Team

deploys.message_first_line: reports: switch to full report scan for accuracy
deploys.author: Victim Dev Team

deploys.message_first_line: checkout: drop redundant session-cart null check
deploys.author: Victim Dev Team

tool_input.root_cause: Deploy 32a55d5 ("reports: switch to full report scan for accuracy") replaced the fast, indexed report query in src/routes/reports.ts with a synchronous full-table-scan simulation (`await sleep(2200 + rand*1600)`), turning GET /api/reports into a 2.2–3.8s blocking call. This is the currently-live deploy (is_current: true) and its introduced latency range exactly matches the observed incident: p95=3200ms/p99=3800ms in get_metrics, and a log entry showing "GET /api/reports completed in 3187ms (slow query)" — both squarely inside the 2200–3800ms window the diff introduces. No error-rate increase (0%) and no other suspicious deploys (4e677cc is a later, unrelated config change and not live) rules out other causes.
tool_input.title: Revert "reports: switch to full report scan for accuracy" — fixes checkout-api p95 latency breach

tool_input.root_cause: Deploy 32a55d5 ("reports: switch to full report scan for accuracy"), the currently live commit on checkout-api, replaced the fast indexed report query with a simulated full-table-scan that awaits a 2200–3800ms sleep before responding on GET /api/reports. This directly caused the p95/p99 latency breach.
